_comment: LAT-2826 — EN ui_strings-overlay voor /en/reizen-nareizen/ (listing + pakketdetail). Zonder deze values valt t() terug op de NL-default en staat er op /en/ Nederlands. REDACTIONEEL VASTGESTELD in LAT-2835: de titel 'Travels & afterwards' is goedgekeurd, en de hero-intro is door de Lead Editor op drie punten herschreven (wine journey / a bottle too many / take shape). Die tekst is definitief — wijzig 'reizen.index.hero.desc' niet zonder redactie; scripts/i18n-reizen-nareizen.test.mjs zet 'm vast. Seeden met: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node directus/scripts/seed-ui-strings-en.mjs directus/data/ui-strings-en-lat2826.json --force (de --force is nodig omdat de eerste seed nog de niet-goedgekeurde conceptzin bevatte).
reizen.index.meta.title: Travels & afterwards — Martino's wine journeys | VinoMartino
reizen.index.meta.description: Reports from wine journeys across Europe and beyond. Marijn travels, tastes and writes — after the trip, when it tells better.
reizen.index.hero.label: Travels & afterwards
reizen.index.hero.desc: Every wine journey ends on the way home. Sometimes in a packed intercity with a bottle too many in your backpack, sometimes in a quiet carriage with notes in a linen notebook. These are the stories that only really take shape afterwards — once the smell of the cellar has faded but the feeling has not.
reizen.index.empty.title: The stories are on their way
reizen.index.empty.descPre: Nothing has been published here yet. In the meantime, start with the
reizen.index.empty.descPost: — that is where the journeys begin.
